content: Existing Self-Refine frameworks for LLMs can be significantly enhanced by integrating multiple inconsistent self-perspectives drawn from LLM self-reflection mechanisms, creating a multi-perspective iterative self-refinement loop that outperforms the original single-perspective feedback approach. This combined framework retains the core advantage of the original Self-Refine method—no additional training, labeled data or reinforcement learning is required—while addressing the limitation of narrow, biased self-feedback that plagues many existing self-refinement setups.
